---
title: "Replication — Data"
---

## Goal

Load the three raw source datasets exactly as the production pipeline
does, harmonise them into a single monthly district-level panel, and
engineer the lag + rolling features used by every downstream model.

By the end of this page you should have a `df` DataFrame with the
features listed in [Method](../paper/03-methodology.qmd) and a deterministic
train/test split keyed on date.

## Source datasets

Three CSVs live in `data/` alongside this site (small enough to commit):

| File | Rows | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data/typhoid_data_1.csv` | ~7,500 | district-month case counts (2015–2023) |
| `data/typhoid_data_2.csv` | small | aggregated secondary source |
| `data/climate_data.csv` | ~7,500 | ERA5-Land + CHIRPS climate variables |
| `data/flood_data.csv` | hundreds | historical flood event records |

For the full upstream pipeline (`loader.py`, `processor.py`,
`engineer.py` etc.) point at the production project directory:
`/Users/labaik/Desktop/Invoices/k/alldocumentsrelatedtoresearch/`.

## Load + peek

```{python}
#| label: load-typhoid
#| code-fold: show

import pandas as pd

typhoid = pd.read_csv("../data/typhoid_data_1.csv")
print(f"rows: {len(typhoid):,}   cols: {typhoid.shape[1]}")
typhoid.head()
```

```{python}
#| label: load-climate
#| code-fold: show

climate = pd.read_csv("../data/climate_data.csv")
print(f"rows: {len(climate):,}   cols: {climate.shape[1]}")
climate.head()
```

```{python}
#| label: load-flood
#| code-fold: show

flood = pd.read_csv("../data/flood_data.csv")
print(f"rows: {len(flood):,}   cols: {flood.shape[1]}")
flood.head()
```

## Pre-computed descriptive statistics

For reference, the descriptive statistics that appear in
[Methodology](../paper/03-methodology.qmd) were computed after the full
merge + feature engineering pipeline:

```{python}
#| label: tbl-desc
#| tbl-cap: "Descriptive statistics of the engineered feature panel."
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd
desc = pd.read_csv("../tables/descriptive_statistics.csv", index_col=0)
desc.round(2)
```

## Feature engineering note

The `engineer.py` module in the production project constructs:

- One-month lags: `precip_lag1`, `temp_mean_lag1`, `humidity_lag1`,
  `flood_lag1`, `cases_lag1`
- Three-month rolling means: `precip_roll3`, `temp_roll3`
- Cyclical month encodings: `month_sin`, `month_cos`
- Monsoon indicator: `monsoon` (1 if month ∈ {6,7,8,9})
- Log-transformed target: `log_cases = log(1 + cases)`

To regenerate the engineered panel from this site, copy the production
modules into a `src/` directory at the site root and call
`FeatureEngineer().create_features(merged)`. See
`main.py` in the upstream project for the exact orchestration.

::: {.callout-note}
Continue to **[Train](train.qmd)** to fit the three predictive models.
:::
